title: Formula- Consecutive Months Worked

posts.author: aza.rose (Aza Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello I am looking for help either building a formula or maybe an automation I am not sure which one I am looking for.
The Use Case
We employ hourly employees on a 9-Month contract. This contract is the total number of months worked so if they work January february and may the total number of months worked would be 3 and not 5. I am hoping to upload the distribution of funds data witha a date column into monday and have monday be able to count the number of months worked for an individual.

How would you go about this? I have a few half baked ideas but I wanted to come to the community for some more insights and questions to get me thinking about this process a little more.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @aza.rose

What are you doing for timesheets? Would love to understand what the distribution of funds data includes. I bet we could figure something out together

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
